meaning: n.与会者(集合称),集合,集会,装配
examples: A low buzz of admiration swept through the assemblage.
He had an assemblage of old junk cars filling the backyard.
Tropical rainforests have the most varied assemblage of plants in the world.
What now lays in storage is an assemblage of garments that reflects a full life.
The space has a casualness to it, with an assemblage of vignettes for working and lounging.
